---
title: "Consolidation Exercises - Day2"
author: "Thiago Cordeiro-Almeida"
date: "2026-07-21"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Exercise 1

![](images/Exercise_ViolenceAgainstWomen.png)

# Exercise 2

![](images/Exercise2_AirbnbBcn.png)
